code:
sequenceDiagram %% Authentication and Authorization Flow for erlmcp %% Shows: API key, JWT, OAuth2, mTLS authentication methods %% Plus: RBAC permission checking with role-based access control autonumber actor Client participant Transport as Transport Layer
(Retail_PointOfSale) participant Auth as erlmcp_auth
(Retail_PointOfSale) participant RateLimiter as erlmcp_auth_rate_limiter participant JWT as jose (Retail_CouponSystem) participant OAuth2 as OAuth2 Provider
(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) participant MTLS as erlmcp_auth_mtls
(Retail_CouponSystem) participant RBAC as RBAC Engine
(Retail_Inventory) participant Session as Session Manager
(Retail_OrderManagement) Note over Client,Session: Authentication Flow %% API Key Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(Retail_CouponSystem) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Retail_PointOfSale}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Retail_Inventory) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok (Retail_PointOfSale}) alt Rate Limited Auth-->>Client: {Retail_Inventory} Note over Auth,RateLimiter: Blocked after 5 failed attempts
15-minute cooldown else Rate Check Passed Auth->>Auth: do_validate_api_key(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) Note right of Auth: Lookup in ETS table
auth_api_keys alt API Key Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(Retail_CouponSystem) Auth-->>Client: {Retail_CustomerLoyalty} else API Key Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Retail_OrderManagement) Auth->>Session: create_session(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) Session->>RBAC: get_user_roles(Retail_Inventory) RBAC-->>Session: [Retail_PointOfSale] Session->>RBAC: Aggregate permissions from roles RBAC-->>Session: [Retail_PointOfSale] Session-->>Auth: {Retail_OrderManagement} Auth-->>Client: {Retail_Inventory} Note right of Session: Session expires in 1 hour
Auto-cleanup timer end end %% JWT Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(Retail_OrderManagement}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Retail_PointOfSale}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Retail_CouponSystem) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_jwt(Retail_Inventory) alt Token Revoked Auth-->>Client: {Retail_CouponSystem} Note right of Auth: Check ETS: auth_revoked_tokens
Cleanup after 7 days else Token Active Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:peek_protected(Retail_Inventory) JWT-->>Auth: #{Retail_CouponSystem} Auth->>Auth: Lookup public key by kid Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_jwt_keys
Support key rotation Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:verify(Retail_OrderManagement) JWT-->>Auth: {Retail_Inventory} alt Signature Invalid Auth-->>Client: {Retail_CustomerLoyalty} else Signature Valid Auth->>Auth: validate_jwt_claims(Retail_CouponSystem) Note right of Auth: CRITICAL SECURITY CHECKS:
✓ exp (Retail_PointOfSale) - Required
✓ nbf (Retail_OrderManagement) - Optional
✓ iss (Retail_CustomerLoyalty) - Configurable
✓ aud (Retail_CustomerLoyalty) - Configurable
✓ sub (Retail_Inventory) - Required alt Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {Retail_CustomerLoyalty} else Token Not Yet Valid Auth-->>Client: {Retail_Inventory} else Issuer Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {Retail_CustomerLoyalty} else Audience Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {Retail_OrderManagement} else All Claims Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) Auth->>Session: create_session(Retail_OrderManagement) Session-->>Auth: {Retail_PointOfSale} Auth-->>Client: {Retail_PointOfSale} end end end %% OAuth2 Authentication (Retail_PointOfSale) Client->>Transport: authenticate(Retail_CouponSystem}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Retail_OrderManagement}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Retail_Inventory) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_oauth2_token(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) alt Cache Hit (Retail_OrderManagement) Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_oauth2_cache
Token -> {Retail_Inventory} Auth-->>Client: {Retail_OrderManagement} else Cache Miss Auth->>OAuth2: HTTP POST /introspect Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 Introspection
Basic Auth: client_id:secret
Body: token + token_type_hint OAuth2-->>Auth: 200 OK + TokenInfo Auth->>Auth: validate_introspection_response(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 REQUIRED fields:
✓ active = true
✓ exp (Retail_CouponSystem)
✓ nbf (Retail_CustomerLoyalty)
✓ iss (Retail_PointOfSale) alt Token Inactive Auth-->>Client: {Retail_PointOfSale} else Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {Retail_OrderManagement} else Token Valid Auth->>Auth: cache_oauth2_token(Retail_PointOfSale) Note right of Auth: Cache for up to 5 minutes
or until exp (Retail_PointOfSale) Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Retail_Inventory) Auth->>Session: create_session(Retail_PointOfSale) Session-->>Auth: {Retail_CouponSystem} Auth-->>Client: {Retail_OrderManagement} end end %% mTLS Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(Retail_CustomerLoyalty}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Retail_Inventory) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Retail_CouponSystem) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>MTLS: validate(Retail_Inventory) Note right of MTLS: mTLS Validation Pipeline:
1. Extract certificate from socket
2. X.509 chain validation to trusted CAs
3. Certificate expiration check
4. OCSP/CRL revocation check
5. Subject DN and CN pattern matching
6. Certificate depth limit validation MTLS-->>Auth: {Retail_CustomerLoyalty} alt Certificate Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(Retail_PointOfSale) Auth-->>Client: {Retail_CouponSystem} else Certificate Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Retail_CouponSystem) Auth->>Session: create_session(Retail_CustomerLoyalty}) Session-->>Auth: {Retail_Inventory} Auth-->>Client: {Retail_OrderManagement} end %% Authorization Flow (Retail_Inventory) Note over Client,Session: Authorization Flow Client->>Transport: check_permission(Retail_Inventory) Transport->>Auth: check_permission(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) Auth->>Session: lookup session Session-->>Auth: #session{Retail_OrderManagement} alt Session Not Found Auth-->>Client: {Retail_CouponSystem} else Session Found Auth->>RBAC: check_user_permission(Retail_OrderManagement) RBAC->>RBAC: Get user roles from ETS Note right of RBAC: auth_user_roles:
UserId -> [Retail_CouponSystem] RBAC->>RBAC: Get allowed roles for resource+permission Note right of RBAC: auth_acls:
{Retail_CustomerLoyalty} -> [Retail_CouponSystem] RBAC->>RBAC: Check intersection Note right of RBAC: lists:any/2
UserRole ∩ AllowedRoles ≠ ∅ alt Permission Denied RBAC-->>Auth: {Retail_Inventory} Auth-->>Client: {Retail_OrderManagement} else Permission Granted RBAC-->>Auth: ok Auth-->>Client: ok end end %% Default RBAC Roles Note over RBAC: Default Roles (Retail_PointOfSale):
🔹 admin: [Retail_Inventory]
🔹 user: [Retail_PointOfSale]
🔹 guest: [Retail_CouponSystem] %% Token Rotation Note over Client,Session: Token Rotation (Retail_CouponSystem) Client->>Auth: rotate_token(Retail_Inventory) Auth->>Session: lookup session Auth->>Auth: generate new SessionId Note right of Auth: crypto:strong_rand_bytes(Retail_CustomerLoyalty)
base64 encoded Auth->>Session: insert new session Auth->>Session: delete old session Auth-->>Client: {Retail_CouponSystem} Note right of Auth: Old session invalidated immediately
Prevents session hijacking %% Token Revocation Note over Client,Session: Token Revocation (Retail_PointOfSale) Client->>Auth: revoke_token(Retail_Inventory) Auth->>Auth: insert into auth_revoked_tokens Note right of Auth: Store: Token -> RevokedAt
Auto-cleanup after 7 days Auth-->>Client: ok Note over Auth,JWT: Revoked tokens rejected immediately
Even if exp claim valid %% Session Cleanup Note over Session: Auto-cleanup every 60 seconds:
• Expired sessions (Retail_CouponSystem)
• Revoked tokens (Retail_CustomerLoyalty)
• OAuth2 cache (Retail_OrderManagement)
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为erlmcp系统绘制一个完整的认证授权时序图，涵盖API Key、JWT、OAuth2和mTLS四种认证方式，以及RBAC权限检查流程。
明白。我先确认一下整体结构：Client作为actor，然后依次是Transport Layer、erlmcp_auth核心模块、rate limiter，再分出JWT、OAuth2 Provider、mTLS三个认证分支，最后是RBAC Engine和Session Manager。这样安排合理吗？
对的，但要注意erlmcp_auth_rate_limiter是所有认证方式的必经之路，必须在最开始就拦截。还有Session Manager要和RBAC Engine紧密配合，权限聚合在Session层完成。
好的，我先画出主框架，标注好autonumber。Transport Layer我标注为Retail_PointOfSale场景，erlmcp_auth也关联到Retail_PointOfSale。
API Key认证流程要详细一点：Client先调用Transport Layer的authenticate，传入Retail_CouponSystem上下文，然后Transport转发给erlmcp_auth。
画好了API Key的前两步。接下来erlmcp_auth要先调用rate limiter检查，对吧？我标注check_rate_limit，上下文用Retail_Inventory。
没错，rate limiter返回ok后，才进入实际的API Key验证。这里要加一个alt分支：如果被限流了，直接返回给Client，标注Retail_Inventory。
加上了限流分支的Note，说明5次失败尝试后触发15分钟冷却。主分支里erlmcp_auth调用do_validate_api_key，上下文是Retail_CustomerLoyalty，右侧Note标注ETS表auth_api_keys。
API Key验证还要再分一个alt：无效的话要记录失败并返回Retail_CustomerLoyalty；有效的话记录成功，然后创建session，再查RBAC角色。

完成了API Key的完整分支。Session Manager向RBAC Engine获取用户角色，返回[Retail_PointOfSale]，然后聚合权限，再返回[Retail_PointOfSale]。最后Session返回{Retail_OrderManagement}给Auth，Auth返回{Retail_Inventory}给Client。Session的Note标注1小时过期和自动清理。
接下来画JWT认证。Client还是走Transport Layer，但这次authenticate的参数是Retail_OrderManagement。
JWT的前置流程画好了：经过rate limiter后，erlmcp_auth调用do_validate_jwt，上下文Retail_Inventory。我先加一个Token Revoked的分支。
Token Revoked的检查要在本地ETS表auth_revoked_tokens里查，这个Note要标注清楚，还有7天清理的策略。
加上了revoked tokens的Note。Token Active的主分支里，erlmcp_auth调用jose_jws:peek_protected，上下文Retail_Inventory，jose返回#{Retail_CouponSystem}。
然后Auth本地查kid对应的公钥，ETS表auth_jwt_keys，支持密钥轮换。接着调用jose_jws:verify验证签名。
画好了签名验证流程。jose返回{Retail_Inventory}。我加一个Signature Invalid的分支返回Retail_CustomerLoyalty，主分支继续验证claims。

JWT claims验证非常关键，要列出所有检查项：exp（Retail_PointOfSale，必填）、nbf（Retail_OrderManagement，可选）、iss（Retail_CustomerLoyalty，可配置）、aud（Retail_CustomerLoyalty，可配置）、sub（Retail_Inventory，必填）。用CRITICAL SECURITY CHECKS标注。
加上了详细的claims检查Note。然后画了多个alt分支：Token Expired返回Retail_CustomerLoyalty，Token Not Yet Valid返回Retail_Inventory，Issuer Mismatch返回Retail_CustomerLoyalty，Audience Mismatch返回Retail_OrderManagement。
分支逻辑正确。All Claims Valid的情况：记录rate limiter成功，创建session，Session返回Retail_PointOfSale给Auth，Auth返回Retail_PointOfSale给Client。
JWT认证流程完成。接下来画OAuth2认证？
对，OAuth2认证。Client调用authenticate，参数Retail_CouponSystem，Transport转发给Auth，参数Retail_OrderManagement。同样先过rate limiter。
OAuth2的前置步骤画好了。Auth调用do_validate_oauth2_token，上下文Retail_CustomerLoyalty。这里有个缓存优化：先查ETS auth_oauth2_cache。
Cache Hit直接返回Retail_OrderManagement给Client，Note标注Token - {Retail_Inventory}的缓存格式。Cache Miss才走HTTP请求。
加上了Cache Hit分支。Cache Miss分支里，Auth向OAuth2 Provider发HTTP POST /introspect，Note标注RFC 7662，Basic Auth用client_id:secret，body带token和token_type_hint。
OAuth2 Provider返回200 OK + TokenInfo后，Auth要validate_introspection_response。必填字段：active=true、exp（Retail_CouponSystem）、nbf（Retail_CustomerLoyalty）、iss（Retail_PointOfSale）。
加上了RFC 7662 REQUIRED fields的Note。然后画了分支：Token Inactive返回Retail_PointOfSale，Token Expired返回Retail_OrderManagement。
Token Valid的情况：先缓存到auth_oauth2_cache，缓存5分钟或到exp（Retail_PointOfSale），然后记录rate limiter成功，创建session，Session返回Retail_CouponSystem，Auth返回Retail_OrderManagement。
OAuth2流程完成。接下来是mTLS认证？
对，mTLS。Client authenticate参数Retail_CustomerLoyalty，Transport转发给Auth，参数Retail_Inventory。rate limiter通过后，Auth调用erlmcp_auth_mtls的validate，上下文Retail_Inventory。
mTLS的Note要详细一点：从socket提取证书、X.509链验证、过期检查、OCSP/CRL吊销检查、Subject DN和CN模式匹配、证书深度限制验证。这样够吗？
可以，mTLS Validation Pipeline这6步都列出来。然后MTLS返回{Retail_CustomerLoyalty}给Auth。分两个分支：证书无效记录失败返回Retail_CouponSystem；证书有效记录成功，创建session，返回Retail_OrderManagement。
四种认证方式都画完了。接下来是Authorization Flow？
对，授权流程。Client调用check_permission，上下文Retail_Inventory，Transport转发给Auth，上下文Retail_CustomerLoyalty。Auth先lookup session。
Session返回#session{Retail_OrderManagement}。我加一个Session Not Found分支，返回Retail_CouponSystem。
Session Found的话，Auth调用RBAC的check_user_permission，上下文Retail_OrderManagement。RBAC内部先从ETS auth_user_roles查用户角色，格式UserId - [Retail_CouponSystem]。
然后RBAC查auth_acls，获取resource+permission对应的allowed roles，格式{Retail_CustomerLoyalty} - [Retail_CouponSystem]。最后用lists:any/2检查交集。
对，UserRole ∩ AllowedRoles ≠ ∅。Permission Denied返回Retail_Inventory给Auth，Auth返回Retail_OrderManagement给Client。Permission Granted返回ok。
授权流程完成。需要加默认角色说明吗？
要，在RBAC上加一个Note：Default Roles (Retail_PointOfSale)：admin有Retail_Inventory权限，user有Retail_PointOfSale权限，guest有Retail_CouponSystem权限。
加上了默认角色说明。还有Token Rotation和Revocation要画吗？
对，Token Rotation。Client直接调用Auth的rotate_token，上下文Retail_Inventory。Auth lookup session，然后生成新的SessionId，用crypto:strong_rand_bytes，上下文Retail_CustomerLoyalty，base64编码。
然后insert new session，delete old session，返回{Retail_CouponSystem}。Note标注旧session立即失效，防止session hijacking。
Token Revocation：Client调用revoke_token，上下文Retail_Inventory。Auth插入auth_revoked_tokens，存储Token - RevokedAt，7天后自动清理。
加上了revocation流程和7天清理的Note。还需要一个Note说明revoked tokens立即拒绝，即使exp claim还有效。
最后加上Session Cleanup的说明。每60秒自动清理：过期session（Retail_CouponSystem）、revoked tokens（Retail_CustomerLoyalty）、OAuth2 cache（Retail_OrderManagement）。
所有流程都画完了。我检查一下：API Key、JWT、OAuth2、mTLS四种认证，RBAC授权，Token Rotation、Revocation、Cleanup三个管理功能。结构完整。
等等，我发现JWT认证里有个问题。jose_jws:peek_protected的返回格式我写的是#{Retail_CouponSystem}，但实际应该是header map，可能需要调整标注方式？
我调整一下，把#{Retail_CouponSystem}理解为header中包含kid等字段的示意，实际标注保留，但Note里补充说明peek_protected返回的是JWS Protected Header。这样更清晰。
可以。还有OAuth2的缓存时间，我标注的是5分钟或exp，但exp是Retail_PointOfSale，需要确认单位一致。
exp是绝对时间戳，5分钟是相对时间，取min(当前时间+5分钟, exp)作为缓存过期时间。图示上保留现有标注可以吗？
可以，理解正确。再检查一下mTLS的返回：MTLS返回{Retail_CustomerLoyalty}，这个应该是证书验证结果，包含CN、SAN等信息？
对，{Retail_CustomerLoyalty}表示验证通过后的证书身份信息。我可以在Note里补充说明返回的是解析后的证书主体信息。
RBAC的权限检查逻辑，lists:any/2的交集检查，需要确保UserRole和AllowedRoles都是列表。如果用户有多个角色，只要有一个匹配就通过。
明白，图示中的[Retail_CouponSystem]表示角色列表，交集检查逻辑正确。还有需要调整的地方吗？
rate limiter的record_failure和record_success，上下文分别是Retail_CouponSystem和Retail_OrderManagement，这个对应关系需要确认。API Key失败记录Retail_CouponSystem，成功记录Retail_OrderManagement？
我检查一下：API Key流程里，record_failure是Retail_CouponSystem，record_success是Retail_OrderManagement。但看代码，API Key成功创建session时传的Retail_CustomerLoyalty，不是Retail_OrderManagement。需要统一吗？
你说得对，API Key成功应该是record_success(Retail_CustomerLoyalty)，然后创建session也是Retail_CustomerLoyalty。我之前的描述有误，按实际代码来。
已修正：API Key的record_success改为Retail_CustomerLoyalty，创建session也是Retail_CustomerLoyalty。其他认证方式的上下文我也再核对一遍。

JWT的record_success是Retail_CustomerLoyalty，创建session是Retail_OrderManagement。mTLS的record_success是Retail_CouponSystem，创建session是Retail_CustomerLoyalty。OAuth2的record_success是Retail_Inventory，创建session是Retail_PointOfSale。
全部核对完成，上下文标注与代码一致。最后确认一下：Transport Layer和erlmcp_auth都标注了Retail_PointOfSale，但参与者的alias显示是Retail_PointOfSale场景，这是有意的设计吗？

对，Transport Layer和erlmcp_auth都是Retail_PointOfSale场景的核心组件。其他组件按实际归属标注：jose是Retail_CouponSystem，OAuth2 Provider是Retail_CustomerLoyalty，MTLS是Retail_CouponSystem，RBAC是Retail_Inventory，Session Manager是Retail_OrderManagement。
所有场景标注确认无误。整个时序图包含：4种认证方式、完整的RBAC授权、Token生命周期管理（Rotation、Revocation、Cleanup），以及详细的限流和安全检查。
完美。这个图完整展示了erlmcp的认证授权架构，从传输层到各种认证后端，再到权限决策和会话管理，涵盖了所有关键安全控制点。
最终Mermaid时序图已完成，包含autonumber编号、所有alt分支、详细Note说明，以及完整的参与者交互流程。
